runTitle: Weekly follow-up hardening local contract closure
skippedSurfaces: Reporter live generation rerun; existing production non-degraded proof is QA-20260519-0529

expertAssessments.rationale: Local contract tests now cover the production QA-20260519-0535 failures, but Vercel production still needs a post-deploy retest before release closure.
expertAssessments.nextAction: Deploy weekly hardening changes and rerun focused Vercel AI Assistant/analyze_server QA.

expertAssessments.rationale: Analyst tools expose deterministic evidence boundaries, signal-strength semantics, and metric-level trend rationale without adding heavy ML or extra LLM loops.
Provider metadata hardening disables unvalidated OpenRouter vision fallback by default and keeps fallback diagnostics structured.

usageChecks.summary: Local deterministic contract closure only; no Vercel function/build usage was generated.

completedImprovements.title: Analyst tools expose deterministic evidence contract
completedImprovements.note: detectAnomalies, detectAnomaliesAllServers, and predictTrends now expose lightweight evidence contract and trend rationale; targeted Analyst tests passed.

completedImprovements.title: analyze_server responses normalize to frontend artifact shape
completedImprovements.note: Cloud Run analyze-server adds timestamp/provider metadata and the Vercel BFF normalizes legacy stringified response payloads.

completedImprovements.title: Explicit remediation queries route to Advisor before anomaly semantic frame
completedImprovements.note: Direct routing regression covers Advisor pre-filter winning over anomaly_detection semantic frame for 조치/해결-style queries.

completedImprovements.title: OpenRouter vision fallback disabled by default and Cerebras GPT-OSS short-output guard added
completedImprovements.note: OpenRouter vision fallback is opt-in only; GPT-OSS requests below 128 output tokens are raised to the validated minimum.

completedImprovements.title: Weekly follow-up planning hygiene and data slot policy updated
completedImprovements.note: Completed root planning files were moved to archive and long-session aiQueryAsOfDataSlot drift was documented as a low-priority accepted tradeoff.

pendingImprovements.title: Deploy weekly hardening changes and rerun focused Vercel production QA
pendingImprovements.note: Local contracts are green; production closure requires GitLab pipeline/deploy and focused Vercel retest for AI Chat remediation and analyze_server shape.

notes: Validation commands included Analyst targeted tests, AI Engine full test, root type-check/lint/test:quick/test:contract, docs checks, and git diff --check.
This run intentionally does not count toward summary because it verifies local contract closure before deployment.
